commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=9407020c2f21106210427bc723ee549a0e7f27b3)
commands.review_summary:
The PR broadens Windows `schtasks` access-denied fallback matching and adds a Spanish regression test, while also changing Codex idle-watch handling, Ollama ambient-discovery warnings, and Windows plugin-skill symlink creation.

Reproducibility: yes. source-backed rather than locally run: current main only matches English denial text while the linked bug provides Spanish Windows failure output. A high-confidence live path is `openclaw node install` on a Spanish-locale Windows host where `schtasks /Create` is denied.
commands.review_followup: External PR needs contributor/maintainer handling for real behavior proof and scope/changelog cleanup; automation cannot provide the contributor's Windows proof.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
